activated_rules.rule_name: Consignor match by presence of consignor name anywhere in invoice
Prioritization of consignee identification in invoice
General goods description with invoice reference
China/Hong Kong normalized as equivalent countries

consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Humphree AB' in certificate matches issuer in invoice including legal suffix normalization (AB). Address and country 'Sweden' match after normalization. Company name found explicitly in invoice header and address blocks (rule 4.1.0). No conflicts detected.

goods_description.motivation: Goods descriptions match between certificate and invoice per line items with identical article numbers and quantities. Invoice matches certificate's 'Invoice Nr: S230516' and order number, supporting general goods description reference (rule 4.3.5). No discrepancies found.

quantity.motivation: Quantity in certificate '16kg Gross weight' matches total weight in invoice 'TOTAL WEIGHT: 16KG'. Shipment quantity is 1 package in both documents. Numeric values match exactly allowing for unit normalization and no contradictory quantities are found. Tolerances respected.

origin.motivation: Certificate origin states 'European Union' and 'Sweden' which are normalized and matched to invoice text 'Goods are made in SWEDEN'. Country names normalized per rules. No contradicting origin countries present.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All applicable control points match based on explicit exact or normalized text matching with consistent data in certificate and invoice. No conflicts or discrepancies detected. The document pair meets criteria for automatic approval.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter för avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet och ursprungsland stämmer överens mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt utan ytterligare granskning.
